violations.text: The floors in the walk-in cooler are constructed of concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025
Establishment did not have allergen statement posted for various pastries. PIC removed food product from display case. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

Establishment was lacking food labels with list of ingredients for various pastry. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

Apples were observed being stored in grab n go cooler without being protected from consumer contamination. FOOD on display shall be protected from contamination.PIC individually wrapped apples. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
Beverage Cooler located in the retail area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Shelf stable beverages were observed stored in cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage station counters and open case vents have an accumulation of dust and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

The floors in the walk in cooler are constructed of concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

The floors throughout facility under equipment and walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
